title: Trimz Single Herringbone Cotton Ribbon, Natural, 15mm x 5m
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Made from 100% high quality cotton, soft and smooth without snagging and rucking.

Wide range of uses for all kinds of art and craft projects, wedding, birthday party, bunting making, dress making & alterations, piping making, binding seams, finishing raw edge, edging a wide variety of fabrics.
Single herringbone web patterned cotton band with a fine weave to give a strong and durable finish
Available in a variety of colours including White, Black and Natural
description: Herringbone web patterned cotton band with a fine weave to give a strong and durable finish. Made from 100% high quality cotton, soft and smooth without snagging and rucking. Machine Washable
